subject: New Request: Frontend Engineer – TypeScript – Fintech
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the fintech sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a architect Frontend Engineer with strong experience in TypeScript. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:
• TypeScript
• GCP
• Kubernetes

Details:
Client: Payloop
Start: 2025-04-01
Duration: 3 months
Location: Stockholm (on-site)
Rate: up to 1350 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Maria Svensson
Senior Talent Manager
Konsult Partners
Tel: +46 70 567 89 01
